title: My dad bragged online about sexually abusing me. But he was making it all up
summary: We were really close.” Then one morning, police officers arrived at her family home to arrest him for sexually abusing her. “I had just moved out to live with friends and start my first proper job,” she explains, “but the police didn’t know that. They were trying to protect me.” Emily is telling this story two years on, with her mum, Fiona, by her side.

title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness review – a total TV shambles from Larry David
summary: The Instagram algorithm sends me a lot of him, because it knows I always click on him being charming with babies, statesmanlike in speeches, cool at rallies, articulate and witty at anything, endlessly composed, compassionate, intelligent, handsome, thoughtful – a fully functioning adult human, if you want the short version. The algorithm does not know that I jack-knife in pain before I click and weep softly at how far we – the US sneezed, but the UK has surely caught a cold – have fallen.And then he turns up at the beginning of Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness: an Almost History of America (one of the offspring of his and Michelle’s TV company, Higher Ground Productions) to remind us that on top of all that he also has immaculate comic timing. As he walks through what I assume is the new Barack Obama Presidential Center, he modulates his performance so beautifully that I almost began to softly weep again.

title: At a poet’s memorial, I saw how Andy Burnham could be a different kind of prime minister | Blake Morrison
summary: Burnham wasn’t the only politician to speak; Richard Burgon, MP for Leeds East, is another fan (in 2020 he put down an early day motion in parliament that recognised how Harrison had “always written, and spoken, for the people”). An English teacher at his school put him on to V, Harrison’s long poem, set in a Leeds graveyard, which became infamous after Richard Eyre dramatised it for Channel 4. V recounts the poet’s confrontation with a skinhead who has sprayed graffiti on headstones, a young man with whom he turns out to have quite a lot in common.Blake Morrison is emeritus professor at Goldsmiths, University of London and the author of the poetry collection Afterburn Continue reading...

title: Who would the US need to beat to win the World Cup? Probably only Spain, France and England
summary: Mauricio Pochettino’s team won their group after some impressive performances. Or so the Fifa slogan could have been expanded to say, given the mind-warping that arose from the formula for slicing the newly expanded 48-team tournament down to 32 sides for the first knockout round.After all, why do a random draw when you can build a matrix with 495 possible scenarios in order to assign the fixtures for the eight best third-placers? Anyway, what matters is that Mauricio Pochettino’s team will face Bosnia and Herzegovina in the round of 32, and no new format is going to stop us from – in time-honored fashion – speculating wildly about what may happen next while we still have the chance, with the potential for American wins rated using one of the mantra-loving manager’s motivational rallying cries of choice.

title: Andy Cohen Claims To Be A Deadhead But Only Just Found Out Phil Lesh Was On Real Housewives In 2008
summary: Andy Cohen is famously a Deadhead — so much so that Dead & Company's John Mayer once had to clarify that they were not in a romantic relationship — yet somehow he was unaware that a founding member of the beloved band once made a cameo on The Real Housewives Of New York City. His son Grahame broke the news of the crossover to the Bravo host and went on the show this week to alert the public. summary: Polo Forró da Ema faz parte dos festejos juninos do São João da Moda em Santa Cruz do Capibaribe. Divulgação O último fim de semana de festejos juninos no interior de Pernambuco tem diversos shows em cidades do Agreste e Sertão, com grandes nomes da música nacional. Xand Avião, Gusttavo Lima, Luan Santana e vários outros artistas serão responsáveis por encerrar os festejos do mês de junho.

title: Julio Balestrin assume a preparação do fisiculturista natural Ricardo Lobo
summary: Ricardo Lobo anunciou na noite da última sexta-feira (26) que será preparado por Julio Balestrin. A informação foi divulgada por meio de um vídeo publicado pelo fisiculturista em sua conta no YouTube. Leia mais (06/27/2026 - 15h49)

title: Tarcísio determina prioridade máxima para localizar criminosos que atiraram contra tenente da Rota na Grande SP
summary: Tenente da Rota é baleado na cabeça em São Caetano do Sul, na Grande SP O governador de São Paulo, Tarcísio de Freitas (Republicanos), afirmou neste sábado (27) ter recebido “com profunda indignação” a notícia do atentado contra o tenente da Rota Ronickson Pimentel dos Santo, que foi baleado na cabeça por dois homens em uma moto na Avenida Goiás, em São Caetano do Sul, neste sábado (27).

title: Motociclista morre após bater de frente com viatura da PM durante perseguição no ES
summary: Motociclista morre após bater de frente com viatura da PM durante perseguição no ES Um motociclista de 34 anos morreu após bater de frente com uma viatura da Polícia Militar na noite de sexta-feira (26), na BR-393, nas proximidades do Parque de Exposições, em Cachoeiro de Itapemirim, no Sul do Espírito Santo.

title: Brasileiro investigado por atuar em grupo criminoso inspirado no neonazismo é preso na Itália
summary: Polícia Federal PF/Arquivo Um brasileiro procurado pela Interpol foi preso neste sábado (27) em Pavia, na Itália, segundo a Polícia Federal. O homem tinha um mandado de prisão preventiva emitido pela 7ª Vara Federal de Florianópolis (SC) e não teve a identidade divulgada. Segundo a PF, ele é investigado por envolvimento em uma organização criminosa inspirada na ideologia neonazista.

title: Supersalários: STF forma maioria para liberar parte de penduricalhos barrados em julgamento
summary: Corte alcança seis votos para flexibilizar parte das restrições impostas em março; decisão preserva direitos adquiridos antes da tese fixada pelo Supremo e mantém vedação a benefícios como auxílio-alimentação e auxílio-creche

title: Líder neonazista foragido do Brasil é preso na Itália
summary: Condenado por mortes em disputa de grupo neonazista, João Guilherme Correa foi preso em área rural na Itália

title: Emma Raducanu out of Wimbledon? Rumours swirl as British No.1 abandons practice session
Pai usou IA para planejar morte do filho de 8 anos e evitar pensão
summary: Pai registrava no ChatGPT intenção de matar filho de oito anos para não pagar pensão alimentícia. Ele pretendia cometer também outros crimes. Ao acessar os dados, provedor do serviço repassou para o FBI, que acionou o Ministério da Justiça

title: IBM, Red Hat, and Deloitte Announce Lightwell Collaboration to Help Strengthen Open Source Software Supply Chain Trust
summary: Deloitte collaborates with IBM and Red Hat to scale automated vulnerability patching across regulated software supply chains
